meanings.definition: a source of danger; a possibility of incurring loss or misfortune
examples: drinking alcohol is a health hazard

meanings.definition: an unknown and unpredictable phenomenon that causes an event to result one way rather than another
examples: we ran into each other by pure chance

meanings.definition: an obstacle on a golf course
put forward, of a guess, in spite of possible refutation
examples: I am guessing that the price of real estate will rise again
I cannot pretend to say that you are wrong
I will stake my good reputation for this

meanings.definition: take a risk in the hope of a favorable outcome
examples: When you buy these stocks you are gambling
